news.t: Oil slides on Iran supply hopes; bond yields pushed lower before Warsh debut
Treasurys Rise in Likely Catchup Play to Other Global Government Bonds
US Treasury rout tests Washington's tolerance for higher borrowing costs
Ominous bond trades point to much higher rates
30-year Treasury yield tops 5.1%, highest in nearly a year
Betting on long Treasury bonds when yields near 5% has been a slam-dunk trade over the past few years. Is this time different?
ETF issuers defied investor expectations by raising fees in 2023. They may have to keep doing it.
ETF investors flee cash-like government bond funds, favor riskier assets in ‘bullish buying'
Here are ETF themes and categories investors may want to consider in the second half of 2023
Why it is risky for ETF investors to blindly chase the small-cap rally

overview.description: The PIMCO 25+ Year Zero Coupon US Treasury Index Exchange-Traded Fund (ZROZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-weighted index comprising separate trading of registered interest and principal of Securities (STRIPs), with a remaining maturity of 25 years+. ZROZ was launched on Oct 30, 2009 and is issued by PIMCO.
infoTable: ICE BofA Long US Treasury Principal STRIPS

data.title: Oil slides on Iran supply hopes; bond yields pushed lower before Warsh debut
data.text: Crude prices fell on Wednesday on news that Iranian fuel may ​soon hit the world's markets, bringing inflation relief and pushing bond yields lower, while stocks and currencies were quiet ahead of Kev...

data.title: Treasurys Rise in Likely Catchup Play to Other Global Government Bonds
data.text: Treasurys rose in price terms in Asia on Tuesday morning following a U.S. holiday on Monday.

data.title: US Treasury rout tests Washington's tolerance for higher borrowing costs
data.text: President Donald Trump's room to wage war while maneuvering on economic policy is being tested by a force largely beyond his control: the bond market.

data.title: Ominous bond trades point to much higher rates
data.text: The put bets would be a bet on a yield spike since bond prices (value of the TLT fund) move inversely to rates.

data.title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.1%, highest in nearly a year
data.text: Treasuries spiked on Friday as inflation signals continue to muddy interest rate expectations under the new Federal Reserve chair Kevin Warsh.
